name: Plynlimon (Pumlumon Fawr) Ascent
terrain: Grassy moor, boggy peat, featureless summit plateau
highlights: Source of the Severn, Wye and Rheidol — remote 752m roof of Mid Wales.
points_of_interest: Source of the River Severn (monument); source of the River Wye; Bronze Age cairns
viewpoints: Cardigan Bay on rare clear days; Snowdonia northwards
water_features: River Severn source; Llyn Llygad Rheidol glacial tarn
parking_start: Eisteddfa Gurig farm car park (small fee) on A44
food_drink_nearby: Nant yr Arian visitor centre café; Dyffryn Castell Hotel
hazards_notes: Extremely boggy; navigation skills essential; no phone signal
